title: Refresh endpoint crashes on expired token
body: POST /auth/refresh calls verify(), which raises ValueError for expired tokens. The route should catch it and return status 401.

title: GET /users/list leaks password field
body: list_users returns the raw user records including passwords. Strip secrets before returning the list.

title: Token secret hardcoded in source
body: tokens.py uses a hardcoded SECRET. Load it from the environment so production can rotate it.

title: Duplicate user creation is not atomic
body: create_user checks find_user then add_user without locking; concurrent requests can create duplicates.

title: Add role-based access to /users/list
body: Only admins should be able to list users. Add a role check using the token payload.

title: Login does not rate-limit failed attempts
body: Repeated failed logins are allowed without throttling, enabling brute force. Add attempt counting.

title: create_app does not register a health route
body: There is no /health endpoint for liveness checks. Register one in create_app.
